earthscope_service.required_acknowledgement: EarthScope Consortium NSF SAGE Facility plus every network operator/source
earthscope_service.default_guidance: EarthScope states that data without an owner-declared licence are distributed as CC BY 4.0; this manifest does not infer whether a declaration is absent.

realtime_snapshot.reason: one packet-recency snapshot is not an uptime, continuity or latency distribution

release_policy: Commit compact queries, hashes and derived QC metrics only; keep MiniSEED and StationXML off Git until every operator-specific licence is resolved.
